title: Fix JSON parsing error with Unicode characters
original_text: Fixed a JSON parsing error when handling Unicode characters in user input. The parser was using ASCII encoding instead of UTF-8. Updated the JSON decoder to use encoding='utf-8' and added error handling for malformed JSON. This fixes the issue where non-ASCII characters would cause a crash. Modified utils/json_parser.py and added tests for Unicode input. Result: 15 tests pass.
expected_subject: fix(json): use UTF-8 encoding for Unicode support
expected_body_lines: - Update JSON decoder to use UTF-8 encoding
- Add error handling for malformed JSON
- Add regression tests for Unicode input
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(json): use UTF-8 encoding for Unicode support"
